rendered_options.label: A

rendered_options.title: Information-first: monitor an identified rival intelligence gap
tradeoff_bullets: costs AP and delays direct action; any signal remains partial

rendered_options.label: D
rendered_options.title: Public access pledge: commit to an access target
tradeoff_bullets: may reduce policy pressure but creates a visible follow-through obligation
